title: anthopogon detonsus
side_effects: Anthopogon detonsus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing severe gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and vomiting, due to its high concentration of anthraquinones. Additionally, excessive consumption may lead to cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and low blood pressure, as a result of the plant's ability to alter blood flow and pressure. In some cases, Anthopogon detonsus can also cause allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and respiratory issues, particularly in individuals with pre-existing allergies. Furthermore, its improper use can also lead to kidney damage and failure in severe cases, emphasizing the importance of proper dosing and medical supervision.
